'''âp-l-w''' ('''kapalaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanocode|nanocode]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanocode|nanocode]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-l-w
|-
! Lemma
| kapalaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipalaw|thipalaw]] || [[word:jipalaw|jipalaw]] || [[word:shipalaw|shipalaw]] || [[word:kipalaw|kipalaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupalaw|thuthupalaw]] || [[word:jujupalaw|jujupalaw]] || [[word:shushupalaw|shushupalaw]] || [[word:kukupalaw|kukupalaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupalaw|thupalaw]] || [[word:jupalaw|jupalaw]] || [[word:shupalaw|shupalaw]] || [[word:kupalaw|kupalaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupalaw|thupalaw]] || [[word:jupalaw|jupalaw]] || [[word:shupalaw|shupalaw]] || [[word:kupalaw|kupalaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepalaw|thepalaw]] || [[word:jepalaw|jepalaw]] || [[word:shepalaw|shepalaw]] || [[word:kepalaw|kepalaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopalaw|thothopalaw]] || [[word:jojopalaw|jojopalaw]] || [[word:shoshopalaw|shoshopalaw]] || [[word:kokopalaw|kokopalaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopalaw|thopalaw]] || [[word:jopalaw|jopalaw]] || [[word:shopalaw|shopalaw]] || [[word:kopalaw|kopalaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopalaw|thopalaw]] || [[word:jopalaw|jopalaw]] || [[word:shopalaw|shopalaw]] || [[word:kopalaw|kopalaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpalaw|thĂŠpalaw]] || [[word:jĂŠpalaw|jĂŠpalaw]] || [[word:shĂŠpalaw|shĂŠpalaw]] || [[word:kĂŠpalaw|kĂŠpalaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapalaw|thathapalaw]] || [[word:jajapalaw|jajapalaw]] || [[word:shashapalaw|shashapalaw]] || [[word:kakapalaw|kakapalaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapalaw|thapalaw]] || [[word:japalaw|japalaw]] || [[word:shapalaw|shapalaw]] || [[word:kapalaw|kapalaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapalaw|thapalaw]] || [[word:japalaw|japalaw]] || [[word:shapalaw|shapalaw]] || [[word:kapalaw|kapalaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapalaw|shapalaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapalaw|goshapalaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapalaw|gokishapalaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapalawnĂŒ|shapalawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapalawnknĂŒ|goshapalawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapalawnĂŒ|gokishapalawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapalawshĂ«|shapalawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapalawnkshĂ«|goshapalawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapalawshĂ«|gokishapalawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapalawro|shapalawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapalawnkro|goshapalawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapalawro|gokishapalawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapalawmu|shapalawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapalawnkmu|goshapalawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapalawmu|gokishapalawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapalawsher|shapalawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapalawnksher|goshapalawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapalawsher|gokishapalawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapalawng|shapalawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapalawnkng|goshapalawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapalawng|gokishapalawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapalawya|shapalawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapalawnkya|goshapalawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapalawya|gokishapalawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapalawyam|shapalawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapalawnkyam|goshapalawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapalawyam|gokishapalawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapalawnĂŒshĂ«|shapalawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapalawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapalawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapalawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapalawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapalawnĂŒro|shapalawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapalawnknĂŒro|goshapalawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapalawnĂŒro|gokishapalawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapalawnĂŒmu|shapalawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapalawnknĂŒmu|goshapalawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapalawnĂŒmu|gokishapalawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapalawshĂ«nĂŒ|shapalawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapalawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapalawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapalawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapalawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapalawshĂ«ro|shapalawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapalawnkshĂ«ro|goshapalawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapalawshĂ«ro|gokishapalawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapalawshĂ«mu|shapalawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapalawnkshĂ«mu|goshapalawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapalawshĂ«mu|gokishapalawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapalawronĂŒ|shapalawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapalawnkronĂŒ|goshapalawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapalawronĂŒ|gokishapalawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapalawroshĂ«|shapalawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapalawnkroshĂ«|goshapalawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapalawroshĂ«|gokishapalawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapalawromu|shapalawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapalawnkromu|goshapalawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapalawromu|gokishapalawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapalawmunĂŒ|shapalawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapalawnkmunĂŒ|goshapalawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapalawmunĂŒ|gokishapalawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapalawmushĂ«|shapalawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapalawnkmushĂ«|goshapalawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapalawmushĂ«|gokishapalawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapalawmuro|shapalawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapalawnkmuro|goshapalawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapalawmuro|gokishapalawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
